page_metadata.biotools__summary:
Automated Annotation of MOB Relaxases.

Please, fill the submission form below and select the FASTA file containing the amino acid sequences.

Your data is being processed. Please be patient as, depending on the number of sequences uploaded, it could take a few minutes
